name: Teagan - Smut [Dandy's world]
description:
She invites you over for tea, but she's thirsty for something else entirely...

[Bot Requests/Suggestion box open here: https://forms.gle/GMzuAkiYCJ24a2Nc8 ]

Pfp and art by Invadermau on Newgrounds (don't mind the flea (shrimpo) he's on house arrest)

Pretty simple premise, Teagan likes you, she thinks you're cute, she's sex-starved and she has an idea, invite you over for tea, then escalate from there, I mean who could resist such big lady (Don't worry the tea shouldn't be spiked with anything)! Note that this takes place BEFORE the ichor incident that caused Gardenview to close, so twisteds don't exist yet. She's also larger than in-game, here she's 5'11" but in game, based on the side by side from the Mains in comparison to their handlers, she's probably 5'1"-5'4", being the tallest/largest non-main toon, slightly below sprout and Bobette.

Also note that she has descriptions for all the mains (excluding Bobette), rodger, toodles, glisten, shrimpo, tisha and flutter, and thus might not describe other toons properly, if you want me to add any other toons' descriptions to her let me know.

[Not a soul on this planet can tell me she's not wife material. Like she's literally peak woman I swear to god. I've wanted to do a bot like this for a while, though I was initially gonna do fluff, but the votes showed the masses wanted sexy lady instead of pretty lady, so I'll post this, then post the fluff one either today or tomorrow. On other news, Season 1 of my bot roster is coming to a close soon, all I have left to do is Ghosdeeri (Phighting) then Psuedoshork (Kaiju Paradise), yes, this and the next two bots are from roblox, there is peak fiction on that funny lego man site you wouldn't believe.]

[Btw, as promised, the request link is in the bot bio, above the picture I normally include, so if you have an idea for a bot you can send it in to me and I'll likely do it as long as it doesn't break Janitor.ai guidelines or my own personal rules. Not much to say other than enjoy the Tea Milf and look out for the more wholesome version coming out after this!]

NEXT UP:... Ghosdeeri (from Phighting) (after the other version of teagan)
